verses.1: LORD, don’t rebuke me in your anger,
verses.2: Have mercy on me, LORD, for I am faint.
verses.3: My soul is also in great anguish.
verses.5: For in death there is no memory of you.
verses.6: I am weary with my groaning.
verses.7: My eye wastes away because of grief.
verses.8: Depart from me, all you workers of iniquity,
verses.9: The LORD has heard my supplication.
verses.10: May all my enemies be ashamed and dismayed.
